ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Needed
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the features of our SaaS platform. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription (Plan: Pro Unlimited, ID: SUB-2026-04-07) is set to renew on 15th April 2026. To ensure uninterrupted service, please review and confirm your payment details.

If you wish to change the billing method or upgrade/downgrade your plan, simply click <URL> and follow the prompts. Our team is available 24/7 to assist with any queries.

Thank you for choosing our services. We look forward to supporting your business growth.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team

---
Note: This email was sent directly from our system. No personal data was accessed during this communication.

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Support Ticket Resolved - Action Required
spam.body:
Hi Team,

We have detected a critical issue with your account (Ticket No: IT-9876). Our automated scan shows that your system may have been compromised by a malicious script. To protect your data and prevent further access, we have temporarily locked your user session.

Please verify your credentials immediately by clicking <URL>. Once verified, we will unlock your account and provide a safety audit report.

⚠️ If you do not act within 24 hours, the temporary lock will be enforced permanently and you may lose access to your services.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best,
IT Helpdesk

---
Note: This ticket is auto-generated. No human operator has accessed your personal information.
